programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Georgie has a difficult decision to make regarding her equine skills. New parents Amy and Ty try to maintain a social life. Mitch confides in Jack about his move to Calgary.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty prepare a wild horse for overseas transport but find it more difficult than expected. While training with Flame, Georgie is distracted by Wyatt's return.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou returns from New York and presents a difficult decision for Georgie to make about showjumping. Caleb makes a small mistake at the rodeo school. Jack and Lisa adjust to living together.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lisa reveals to Amy that the racehorse she's working with is a clone. Jen throws a party at Maggie's in honor of Lou's success. Georgie convinces Adam to be Wyatt's math tutor.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Tim's erratic behavior sparks concern from his loved ones, Jack suspects something else is going on.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy tries to get everything at Heartland organized before joining Ty on a work-related journey.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Tim arrive in Mongolia but find out that Ty is in danger. Georgie's confidence is rattled by Val right before her upcoming competition.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim is forced to examine his feelings for Casey. Amy works with a former racehorse in need of a new owner. Jack steps out of his comfort zone to support Lisa. Wyatt returns with a warning for Georgie.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim rallies the family together for a memorial ride on the tenth anniversary of Marion's death. Jade is offered a scholarship at a school in Texas.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou throws herself into planning her high school reunion to impress her old rival. Amy tries to stay focused as Georgie comes up against an unexpected challenge while beginning training with Phoenix.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou recalls all of her past relationship troubles, after what happened at her high school reunion. Ty and Amy are rattled when they find their home broken into.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Georgie convinces Amy to work with a high-strung and dangerous jumping horse. Back for Thanksgiving, Jade finds out why Tim wanted her to take the rodeo scholarship.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A training accident results in an injury, and an unlikely ally arrives to show support.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty decide what to do with the land Jack gifted to them. Lou is unsure how to support Georgie, who is considering giving up showjumping because of viral video.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay inspira a los seis concursantes, llevándolos al restaurante que administrará el ganador de esta temporada. El ganador de la temporada 3, Rock Harper, hace una aparición especial.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los cinco Chefs restantes a que enseñen a amas de casa con problemas en la cocina a preparar una comida gourmet. El ganador recibe consejos culinarios de los Chefs Mark Peel y Ben Ford.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los últimos cuatro participantes preparan un almuerzo para los invitados sorpresa: ochenta delicadas madres embarazadas. El Chef que tenga el plato preferido gana un boleto de compras de $1,000. Mientras los demás deben limpiar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay prepara un desayuno para los Chefs restantes y luego les pide que reproduzcan el plato. Más tarde, Ramsay sabotea la cena para ver cómo reaccionan los competidores ante la adversidad.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas visitan el restaurante del Chef Ramsay en Nueva York, donde los Chefs ejecutivos de otros restaurantes de Ramsay encuentran que sus platos son únicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Dieciséis Chefs profesionales compiten por un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City. Los participantes deben sorprender al Chef Ramsay con sus platos originales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después del desastre en la cena de la noche anterior, el Chef Ramsay le presenta a los concursantes la comida que desperdiciaron.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los catorce Chefs restantes visitan una carnicería para aprender sobre varios cortes de carne y luego ponen en práctica sus conocimientos. Hell's Kitchen se convierte en la noche en un asador.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los trece Chefs restantes sirvan el desayuno a cincuenta jóvenes futbolistas y porristas. Sin embargo, un equipo se queda sin huevos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce candidatos restantes compran en un mercado asiático y preparan platos de fusión para el Chef Ramsay y la escritora de cocina Tanya Steel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los once Chefs restantes cocinan para un bar mitzvah, preparando variaciones gourmet de los tres favoritos del invitado de honor.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los diez cocineros restantes deben hacer tapas con las sobras. Un error de un Chef hace que ambos equipos tengan un casi fracaso.

programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Balki and Larry baby-sit.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Balki breaks his lease to adopt a stray dog and tries to hide him from Twinkie.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: After Twinkie has an argument with his wife, he moves in with Larry and Balki.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Balki cooks exotic food for his two beautiful neighbors.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Balki is suffering from insomnia and winds up falling asleep during a big sale at the shop.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry worries Balki will embarrass him at a formal party.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry thinks his "little brother" may have stolen his bike.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry tries to become a ski expert overnight so he can impress Jennifer on a group skiing trip.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: An avalanche traps Larry, Balki and Jennifer in a cabin, so they try digging a tunnel to escape.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry's free-spirited sister visits, bringing dreams of becoming a musician.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: After Larry and Balki both get their dream jobs at the Chicago Chronicle, Balki's boss tries to fire him.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: Larry resorts to the Myposian diet - fish-eye soup and pig snouts - in order to lose weight.

programme.title: Perfect Strangers

programme.desc: Balki and Larry confront a breakfast-cereal conglomerate and discover one man can make a difference.

programme.title: The Christmas Yule Blog
programme.desc: Social media travel writer Caroline Williams is sent to New Mexico on an assignment where she meets high school teacher Oscar Ortiz, who introduces her to another side of Christmas.

programme.title: Delivering Christmas
programme.desc: After a young girl tells her mailman that her mother is sad, he decides to bring surprise gifts to the mother to remind her of the Twelve Days of Christmas.

programme.title: A Crafty Christmas Romance
programme.desc: Mandy, the owner of a craft and hobby store, finds a 70-year-old letter to Santa and a valuable coin in a copy of "A Christmas Carol." Along with Jonah, a contractor who donated the book, Mandy sets out to find the author in time for Christmas.

programme.title: Mistletoe Match
programme.desc: When Olivia goes under cover to report on the popular annual Mistletoe Match event, she meets Thomas, who is just as skeptical about the event as she is. Sparks fly, but she may risk losing a promotion for the romance she never saw coming.

programme.title: My Christmas Grandpa
programme.desc: A grouchy cashier is transformed by a child's love and compassion when she asks him to be her grandpa for Christmas.

programme.title: Blending Christmas
programme.desc: A couple's relationship suffers as they try to get their bickering families to get along during a holiday getaway.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tropicana club is about to re-open under new management and is looking to Ricky to put on the best possible show. The only problem is that Ricky has come down with a terrible case of laryngitis, and is unable to talk, much less sing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After members of her club throw her a baby shower, Lucy realizes that Ricky has become jealous of the attention she and the baby are receiving. She consults with a doctor when Ricky complains about nausea, dizziness, and stomach ache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that their unborn child should have artistic leanings, so she takes up sculpting. The fast-talking salesman in the art supply store she visits sells her an enormous amount of modeling clay, claiming she has talent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Could it be? Is Lucy Ricardo not funny? When Lucy's jokes fail to crack a smile amongst her friends and husband, she begins to develop an inferiority complex. Her depression gets worse when she discovers she's no good at bridge.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel flashes back to the time when she and Lucy raced to win the presidency of their club, the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League. When Ethel was nominated for the position, Lucy bribed another member to nominate her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred and Ethel overhear a fight between Ricky and Lucy...or did they? It seems Lucy is reading a murder mystery out loud to the amusement of Ricky. But when Ricky playfully throws the book at Lucy, she ends up with a black eye.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are out a restaurant and Lucy keeps changing her order and their seating. Ricky points out that she constantly changes her mind and never completes things.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' infant is cranky and keeps his parents as well as their neighbors up at night. When a neighbor, Mrs. Trumbull points out that the lease forbids children and threatens to move out along with other tenants.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are exhausted from walking the baby at night and hire a maid. Lucy prepares a list of dos and don'ts in order to set down the law for her new employee. However when Mrs. Porter arrives, she has her own list for her employer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to get into the act when Ricky is producing an Indian show at the Tropicana. Ricky instead hires the Mertzes to be part of the show, hoping Lucy will be cured of her show biz bug now that she is a mother.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky has planned a surprise party for Lucy's birthday and swears the Mertzes and all their friends to secrecy. Lucy, however, only knows that everyone has forgotten her birthday.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: An eligible bachelor is in town, and Lucy wants to set him up with a girlfriend of hers. The bachelor is a lingerie salesman by the name of Eddie Grant who is a friend of the Mertzes. Unfortunately, Lucy's attempts at matchmaking fail.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Without consulting Ricky, Lucy buys new living room furniture, using their old set as a down payment. Waiting for the right moment to tell Ricky the news, she hides the new furniture in the kitchen.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels that she and Ricky are growing apart because they don't share many of the same interests. To make up for this, Lucy decides to invite herself along to a camping trip that Ricky and Fred are going on.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Life magazine does a photo layout on the Ricardos and the only part of Lucy visible in the shot is her elbow. Lucy insists on getting a part in Ricky's act so that she can make a name for herself.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Dismayed that they can't seem to unglue their husbands from the boxing match on TV, Lucy and Ethel decided to go out for a bite to eat. However, at the local café they run into a similar problem.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos have just purchased a new washing machine and despite their better judgment, agree to sell their old one to the Mertzes. The next day the old machine explodes with water and suds and the Mertzes insist that the deal is off.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Snoop Lion
programme.desc: Larry sits down with Snoop Lion to talk about his new name, look, and faith. Plus, Snoop opens up about why he went from being a gun-toting rapper to spreading messages of non-violence in his new reggae song, "No Guns Allowed.

programme.title: Larry King Now: 50 Cent
programme.desc: You know him as a millionaire mogul at the top of his rap game. In this candid interview, 50 Cent sheds his public image to talk about growing up without a father, what he seeks in a partner & why the media doesn’t know who he really is.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Tim McGraw
programme.desc: Larry chats with country music star, Tim McGraw, at the Venetian Hotel in Las Vegas. McGraw opens up about working with his wife, Faith Hill, raising teenage daughters, and making peace with his late father.

programme.title: Larry King Now: The Backstreet Boys
programme.desc: Larry sits down with the Backstreet Boys and talks about their new album, tour, and celebrating 20 years as a group. And, Larry King seeks a definition for the term boy band, a label the group never fully embraced

programme.title: Larry King Now: Celine Dion
programme.desc: Larry chats with pop music icon, Celine Dion, about her return to the spotlight, her new album, and how she is balancing motherhood and fame.

programme.title: Olivia Newton John: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Olivia Newton-John amassed three Grammys and eight American Music Awards.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Akon
programme.desc: Music mogul and actor Akon reflects on his friendship with Michael Jackson, his work to bring electricity to Africa, and why he thinks monogamy is misguided. Plus, how Akon made Lady Gaga a superstar.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Willie Nelson
programme.desc: Country music megastar Willie Nelson invites Larry aboard his tour bus for an open conversation about life as an octogenarian, his iconic career, the legalization of marijuana, and the 2016 presidential race.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Trey Songz
programme.desc: With the release of his sixth album, Trey Songz joins Larry for a conversation about the man he credits for his music education, what his mom sacrificed for his success, and the problems with being a sex symbol.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Linda Perry
programme.desc: It’s a no holds barred discussion with Linda Perry. The producer--known for her work with Alicia Keys and Celine Dion--blasts American Idol, skewers record labels, and comes clean about her falling out with P!nk.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Weird Al Yankovic
programme.desc: With his newest album Mandatory Fun atop the Billboard charts, famed musical parodist Weird Al Yankovic joins Larry to analyze his recipe for long-standing success and discuss a potential Broadway debut. Plus, Weird Al on life in the Yankovic household.

programme.title: Larry King Now: DJ Khaled
programme.desc: Anthem king DJ Khaled joins the king of talk for an illuminating conversation about hip hop’s mounting influence, Jay Z’s genius, and the mistake young rappers make. Plus, the Palestinian producer on the chance for peace in the Middle East.

programme.title: Olivia Newton John: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Olivia Newton-John amassed three Grammys and eight American Music Awards.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Melissa Etheridge

programme.title: Larry King Now: Annie Lennox
programme.desc: The great Annie Lennox sits down with Larry to discuss her new album 'Nostalgia', if she will ever write original music again and why she prefers working in a studio than on a stage.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #14 Episode 0: The First Contact

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/17/79: After falling behind 3-1 in the 1979 World Series, the Pirates rallied to come back and take home a championship. Willie Stargell goes 4-for-5 with a home run in Game 7 to lift the Pirates to a 4-1 win over the Orioles.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/21/80: Tug McGraw strikes out Willie Wilson on a 1-2 fastball in Game 6 sealing the Phillies' 4-1 win over the Royals, bringing home the franchise's first-ever World Series Championship.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/20/82: With the championship on the line, Bruce Sutter comes into the game in the 8th inning to blank the Brewers. The Cardinals captured their ninth World Series win in a dramatic Game 7 win at Busch Stadium.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/10/1982 - Cecil Cooper plates a pair of runs on a go-ahead single in the bottom 7th inning and the Brewers hold on to secure a 4-3 win over the Angels, punching their ticket to the 1982 World Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/84: Kirk Gibson clinched the Tigers' 1984 World Series win with a three-run homer off Goose Gossage. With the win, Sparky Anderson becomes the first manager ever to win a championship in both the American and National Leagues.

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Una verdadera guerra se desata en la casa desde la llegada de Paula.Parece no tener límite. Luego de que el chisme del que habla toda la casa salió a la luz, Paula pelea muy fuerte con Isaac y todo el mundo reacciona empeorando el descontrol.

programme.title: Catfish México
programme.desc: Después de 6 años de una relación en línea intermitente, encuentros fallidos, un divorcio y un hijo, Jesús se cansó y buscó a Catfish México para saber si la persona de quién se enamoró es real.

programme.title: Catfish México
programme.desc: Samantha tiene sentimientos muy fuertes por un perfil en Facebook desde hace 6 meses, que sabe todo lo que hace. Hay 2 sospechosos principales. Chapu y Badalt crearán una red esperando a que el catfish caiga.

programme.title: Catfish México
programme.desc: Hace 3 años Daney hizo una audición para doblar voces en un canal de Youtube, ganó y conoció al amor de su vida; le pidió matrimonio y aceptó pero nunca ha visto su cara. Necesita ayuda urgente.

programme.title: Catfish México
programme.desc: Karla ha encontrado perfiles falsos en la red, utilizando sus fotografías, los ha reportado; algunos han desaparecido y en otros aparece bloqueada. Su mayor preocupación es: ¿qué pueden estar haciendo con esos perfiles falsos? Y, ¿quién está detrás?

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a bandage on his left hand. He pulls back the bandage to show that his hand is still there. Ana scraped her paw but does not want a bandage. Lady Aberlin is able to convince her otherwise.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis

programme.title: Archivos de ovni

programme.title: Estado paranormal

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El estrés puede tener efectos poderosos y destructivos. Puede debilitar tanto el cuerpo como la mente, puede deteriorar las relaciones e incluso puede hacer que un alma se vuelva vulnerable a lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: El 16 de abril de 2008, la ciudad de Kokomo, Indiana, fue sacudida por una gran explosión que perforó muchos oídos. Las casas se agitaron, miles de ciudadanos llamaron al 911 y la policía, los bomberos y Seguridad Nacional se presentaron para investigar.

programme.title: Archivos de ovni
programme.desc: Según los ufólogos, los grises (seres de otro mundo) secuestran a los humanos, les implantan dispositivos y realizan experimentos reproductivos. Son los extraterrestres más "familiares", cuyas imágenes vemos en todos los medios.

programme.title: Estado paranormal

programme.title: Estado paranormal

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.desc: Tony visits San Francisco, a city of districts with quirks and flavors.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony samples an unusual cut of warthog meat with Kalahari bushmen.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony's adventure in Seoul, South Korea, includes kimchi and tae kwon do.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: In Sweden, Tony tries to conquer his unresolved ABBA issues.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony leaves his mark on Sao Paolo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Anthony explores the beauty and cuisine of a country once known as Burma.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony takes Los Angeles, where he zeroes in on an area known as Koreatown.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores Colombia from the mountains to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In Quebec, Tony ice fishes and spends time with two brilliant chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony visits the Interzone, where artists escaped from Western prohibitions.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Libya pulses with hip-hop, Italian restaurants and post-war uncertainty.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony searches the indigenous Andes for rare variety of wild cocoa.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony visits Congo, once an industrial power, now crumbling into chaos.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The host and crew make their first trip to Israel, the West Bank and Gaza.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores Andalucia during Semana Santa, the Holy Week before Easter.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores New Mexico's mash-up of cultures by sampling its food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bev will see her son for the first time in 7 years and find out why he left! Then Joyce suspects that her granddaughter is prostituting out of their home! Later Jenna confesses to her girlfriend, Stephanie, that she's been cheating with her mother!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These denying dads swear there's no way they're the father! These moms need to prove them wrong. The only thing that's missing is the truth! DNA results don't lie, but after the results are read, who will be left looking for more answers?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Brenda and her man Aaron return after proving that Aaron was a cheater! Now they're here to prove that Aaron didn't father Tammie's baby. Then, Cat will test her boyfriend Tim and his brother Don to find out who her child's father is!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki's boyfriend Tavon is cheating on her. What will they say when they watch him on our hidden cameras? Then, was Naomi's fiancé able to resist our sexy decoy? Plus, is Jeremiah's baby with Robin really his?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tempers flare when Belinda's husband finds out she's cheating, but he thinks it's his fault and asks for forgiveness. Next Twist will reveal a huge secret to his fiancee ... he is really a woman!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jennifer refuses to let her ex-boyfriend, Marcus, go. She says she'll get him back no matter what it takes. Next Eddie left Glinda and their two-year-old son 16 years ago. Today Glinda tells Eddie that she wants him back.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Whilst in jail, Scooter asked his dad, Richard, if his wife Keri and their child could move in with him, but he didn't expect Keri and Richard to fall in love!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: First, Denise caught her boyfriend having sex with her mom! Next, Luana suspects that her friend is sleeping with her boyfriend, Leroy. Then, Josh is not too happy when he finds out how his girlfriend affords all the football equipment for her son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: There is nothing more serious than allegations of child abuse, but when all the testimonies are laid out, the stories just don't add up. Steve has the lie detector results and will reveal the truth once and for all.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: 17-year-old Megan has been living with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. He doesn't allow her to go to school, get a job, eat when she wants, or even leave the house without his permission. Will Megan listen to her aunt and let Steve help her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Seth exploits women for money and pleasure, causing Christie immense suffering. She wants to break free from his abuse and low self-esteem. With Steve's assistance, she seeks the strength and motivation to leave this toxic relationship behind.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Megan wanted to find out if her boyfriend Devin was cheating. But even darker relationship secrets surfaced! Plus, you'll be shocked to find out why Laura and Steven need Steve's help again!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Devil Dad
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can we redeem himself?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Ashley's mother is here because she says she's witnessed first hand Ashley's boyfriend Scott's abusive ways. She says that Scott has completely isolated Ashley and her grandchild from the rest of her family.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿El prometido de Tiffany, Deon, dejó embarazada a su mejor amiga lesbiana? Después, William cree que sus 2 de sus 6 hijos con su ex-esposa Nicole no son suyos y puede ser el padre del hijo de otra mujer! ¡Nuestras pruebas de ADN nos revelan la verdad!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas madres están desesperadas por encontrar a los padres desaparecidos de sus hijos. Pero estos padres que niegan que son los verdaderos padres y dicen que es imposible que lo sean.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estos invitados dicen que están seguros de saber quién es el padre de sus hijos, pero necesitan una prueba de ADN para comprobarlo. Ahora los resultados están a punto de descubrirse, pero ¿serán los resultados que esperaban?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas parejas decidieron hacer un trío que terminó en un embarazo. Ahora que los bebés han nacido, estos hombres niegan ser los padres. Hoy se verán obligados a reconocer la verdad.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La familia de Jackie no confía en su novio cuando está con sus hijos, pero ella insiste en seguir con él. ¿Qué horrible verdad revelará la prueba del detector de mentiras de Shaqualla sobre su novio?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Katrina cree que el novio de su hermana Kendra es un infiel y que tiene sexo con su mejor amiga, Nay-Nay. Después, John vuelve al escenario con algo sorprendente.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Teneal y Richard cuentan historias diferentes, cada uno alegando que el otro no es apto para ser padre. La verdad se limitará a una prueba con el detector de mentiras, y los resultados serán impactantes.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Hoy Danny por fin está listo para enfrentarse al hombre ausente de su vida y responder a las preguntas de su vida. Steven da varias excusas para no ver a su hijo, pero ¿es posible redimirse?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Cuando la gente normal necesita ayuda, Steve Wilkos está listo para responder a la llamada. Mira cómo Steve ayuda a la gente normal a defenderse y a luchar por sus creencias para promover la justicia para todos.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Tres años más tarde, Elizabeth todavía tiene muchas dudas sobre las intenciones de Manny con su familia y su marido Rodney está en medio. ¿Manny es inocente?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Claudia, Caridad, y Panchita dan la noticia de la muerte de Maximiliano. Cuando Rosaura destapa un regalo, saca un muñeco sin cabeza. Luis Mario y Eva llevan a Maribella al apartamento de Gabriel.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva y Silvia entran a la casa de María Julia para exigirle a Karina que les entregue la carta de Maximiliano. Luis Mario le cuenta a Gabriel lo de Silvano.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le informa a Eduarda y a Maribella que el comisario le dijo que no sabía nada de su hija. Maribella le dice a Luis Mario que ella le puede dar hijos.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Imanol le dice a Adriana que le de otra oportunidad pero Adriana grita que lo odia y Iván sale, preguntándole a Imanol que fue lo que le hizo a ella para que lo odie.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Rosaura conversan sobre la pérdida de su hija. Adriana informa que ve muy mal a Imanol. Luis Mario trata de convencer a Rosaura de que no trabaje con Silvano. Ella no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Maribella así como Silvano y Rosaura se encuentran en el mismo restaurante. Teobaldo le pregunta a su abuela porque le dijo a Luis Mario que la niña se llamaba Angélica.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Guillermo está decepcionado porque Jimena se fue con Rodrigo a ver a Imanol. Luisana lo calma y le dice que tiene que darle tiempo. Luis Mario le cuenta a Eduarda la crisis que sufrió Maribella.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva le dice a Luis Mario que Maribella si puede ver y que lo está engañando. Luis Mario no le cree. Imanol vuelve a pedirle disculpas a Adriana. Ella las acepta.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario contesta el teléfono pero nadie habla. Sonia le cuelga el teléfono a Fidelia y le pregunta con quien estaba hablando. Rodrigo lleva a Karina a su casa y queda en recogerla al día siguiente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Maribella y Sinaí preparan todo para que cuando Rosaura traiga el café se le caiga encima a Maribella, para echarle la culpa. La doctora le informa a Karina que deben hacerle los exámenes nuevamente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Teobaldo piensa cumplir lo que le prometió a Mairita pero su mamá lo descubre. Maribella quiere que Luis Mario se acueste con ella. Pero el no lo acepta.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Teobaldo le confiesa a Rosaura que Angeliquita no es hija de su mamá. Gabriel le propone a Minerva que lo ayude a criar a su hijo. Teobaldo le vuelve a decir a Rosaura que no es verdad.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda llama a Rosaura, diciéndole que su hija está muerta. Karina le dice a Rosaura que no les haga caso. Eduarda y Maribella se ríen por la broma que le gastaron a Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La doctora le informa a Karina que está gravemente enferma debido a su sangre. Mercedes llega cuando Silvano está besando a Rosaura y se mete reclamándole a Silvano que deje tranquila a Rosaura.

programme.title: ONE Vault
programme.desc: ONE: Fists of Fury III hosted some epic showdowns, including a spectacular knockout battle between Mark Abelardo and Emilio Urrutia.

programme.title: ONE Vault
programme.desc: All 3 fights on this incredible recap from ONE: Fists of Fury II ended in specatcular knockouts.

programme.title: ONE Friday Fights
programme.desc: Relive the thrills and excitement lasting from bell to bell and beyond as these fighters look to gain the ultimate prize.

programme.title: ONE Event
programme.desc: Every kick, every strike and every grapple in the full replays of the ONE Championships numbered events in 2018.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hitches a ride on a dragon, Mocha tries to keep the Master's candy away from her friends, and Zoro pits his steel against snow in a battle with Monet!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: It's Zoro vs. Monet in a duel to the death - or is it? Tashigi comes to lend a hand, and she'll need to bring her full might to compensate for Zoro's weakness! Meanwhile, Mocha is running out of options for keeping the candy away from the children.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper, Nami, and Robin watch in horror as Mocha makes a heartbreaking sacrifice in a courageous attempt to save the lives of her friends!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brownbeard heroically attempts to expose Caesar as a villain, the horrific truth about Punk Hazard is finally revealed, and Luffy puts the hurt on his gaseous enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes Caesar pay for his crimes against the children, and Smoker risks his life for a chance to see Vergo fall in battle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law reaches the end of his epic battle with Vergo, and Luffy looks to land a devastating final blow on the murderous gasbag Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Word of Luffy and Law's alliance spreads throughout the world, Chopper and Brook race to stay ahead of the deadly gas, and Joker sends a team to rescue Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The laboratory crumbling around them, and time running out, Luffy, the Straw Hats, the G-5, the children and all the others make a final desperate sprint towards the one exit left off the island - but Joker has one more trick up his sleeve.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Straw Hats and company flee the crumbling laboratory, Caesar's desperate act of vengeance thwarts Joker's plan to forever silence his enemies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky continues his battle with Buffalo and Baby 5, Nami uses a mighty gust of wind to save the children from a deadly cloud of gas, and Usopp takes a shot at capturing Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A dragon regains his boyish form, a noble warrior once feared dead makes a shocking resurrection, and bitter enemies set aside their differences to enjoy a well-deserved feast!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The weary marines and the rescued children get teary-eyed as they say goodbye to the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Law enters into treacherous negotiations with Joker!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On their way after having set out from Punk Hazard, the Straw Hats find out their next destination - just as a huge wave comes crashing down on the Sunny! But it's rough sailing for the G-5 as well, as Donflamingo arrives on the scene and wreaks havoc!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Aokiji's intercession saves Smoker and sends Joker off to rethink his strategy, leaving unanswered questions about Aokiji's current status. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats catch their breath as the Sunny makes its way through the rough seas of the New World.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Smooth seas stretch out before the Straw Hats as they leave Punk Hazard far behind -- but while they fear Donflamingo's return and prepare to face him, another foe lies in wait, whose powers could be their downfall!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Breed has Luffy, Trafalgar, and Chopper firmly in his grasp with his Peto-Peto power! Breed dreams of a world in which he has enslaved all the humans, but Luffy's stubborn persistence and unwillingness to cooperate may have landed him in hot water.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy meets an unexpected acquaintance from the past, Bellamy, who seems to be up to no good! Meanwhile, Caesar Handover Team encounters a snag when they learn just how dangerous Green Bit is!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: Tragedy seems to follow an orphaned girl whom Johnny mentors. Tragedy turns dangerous when the girl is kidnapped.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Mountain
programme.desc: After Johnny is struck by the vision of a plane lost in a crash, thieves in search of a missing treasure take Johnny, Sara, Walt and J.J. hostage.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: Johnny goes public with his vision of a heavyweight contender dying in an upcoming bout but instead of stopping the fight, his announcement turns it into the pay-per-view event of the year.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Visions
programme.desc: Johnny sets out to discover the secret of a mysterious man (Frank Whaley) who appears to be stalking him but actually has a life-changing message for Johnny.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Finding Rachel - Part 1
programme.desc: Johnny becomes the prime suspect in a case involving a missing woman and is confronted by her sister (Sarah Wynter), who clamors for his arrest.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead

programme.title: Goldeneye
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan ignites the screen as James Bond in this explosive, thrill-packed adventure that pits him against a vengeful adversary who controls an awesome space weapon capable of global destruction.

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies
programme.desc: The 18th installment of the series pits Bond (Pierce Brosnan) against a powerful media mogul (Jonathan Pryce) and his wife (Teri Hatcher) who has a secret past with Bond.

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough
programme.desc: In the 19th film of the franchise, James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) is once again pitted against Valentin Zukovsky (Robbie Coltrane), the Russian mobster from Goldeneye. Judi Dench returns as M and Desmond Llewelyn returns as Q.

programme.title: Die Another Day
programme.desc: James Bond's newest mission begins with a spectacular high-speed hovercraft chase through a minefield in the demilitarized zone separating North and South Korea - and the action doesn't let up until the credits roll.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: Based on Ian Fleming's first 007 novel, James Bond (Daniel Craig) must thwart a dangerous Russian spy who is funding global terrorists from winning a poker game worth millions. The 21st film in the most successful film series in cinematic history.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: On a non-stop quest for justice that crisscrosses the globe, Bond (Daniel Craig) uncovers an intricate conspiracy by the mysterious Quantum organization to take control of one of the world's most important natural resources! Judi Dench also stars.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Sin tiempo para morir
programme.desc: Una misión de rescate para salvar a un científico secuestrado se complica más de lo previsto, llevando a Bond (Daniel Craig) a enfrentarse a un enigmático villano equipado con tecnología de última generación.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: Basada en la primera novela de 007 de Ian Fleming, James Bond (Daniel Craig) debe evitar que un peligroso espía ruso gane un juego de póker que vale millones y financia a terroristas globales.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.desc: The master weapons of the animal world when wielded precisely, teeth and claws are the best instruments for hunting, defense and combat in the animal world.

programme.desc: Surviving the Serengeti is a tale of courage and instinct, of hope and desperation—showing that during the long dry season, carnivores have little to hunt but manage to survive and raise their young.

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: Visit a baby chimp at Sydney's Toronga Zoo; an Indian village that has adopted an abandoned sloth bear cub, and see a couple of twin chimpanzees.

programme.title: Lionman: African Safari
programme.desc: Craig heads to England where he meets a man who's lived with wolves. Then he meets a friend in Ireland who has an injured tiger in his back yard and has asked for help.

programme.title: Swimming with Legends
programme.desc: The largest creatures on Earth live underwater. Their sheer size has always triggered our imagination. In murky waters or inaccessible places, we ignored their true nature and created legends. How can we decipher their underwater secrets?

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: After five ruthless hijackers take control of an EgyptAir flight and begin executing passengers, a woman silently says goodbye to her loved ones.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Forced to find another route to Petropavlovsk, the men have arrived by cargo plane with their Jet Ski. Russian border guards shadow the men. Without finding a fuel support boat the team will not be able to continue any further.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: A thick fogbank causes the crew to miss its rendezvous with their fuel support boat. Patrick narrowly escapes injury. It’s fisherman’s day in Russian!

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy has spotted some huge moose, now he just needs to hope his Hawken shoots straight and true!

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Spring black bear are out and moving after a bitter cold winter. Laramy uses old Indian stalking techniques that have been handed down to him through generations of his family heritage.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy shows us how hunting was done in the mid-1800s by the Mountain Men, where unusual skills and stalking techniques were needed to survive throughout the winter. Harsh Winters were known as "White Death" to the Mountain Men.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Elk calls echo through the mountains of Colorado. As night falls, Laramy gets within shooting range of a huge elk.

programme.desc: Coyote comes across a swamp creature that at first glance appears to be an eel...but it walks?!

programme.desc: The Gator Boys do their best to tackle nuisance gators.

programme.desc: On a compound in Florida, one man is killed and another fights for his life when a tiger breaks free and attacks. In Kansas, a young and innocent girl lies broken and dead when her dream photo shoot with a tiger goes badly wrong.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: A leading snake scientist lies dying in a remote jungle, bitten by the creature he set out to find. In North Carolina, a snake obsessive risks death for the 7th time at the fangs of his deadly 6-foot bushmaster.

programme.title: Bad Santa 2
programme.desc: Fueled by cheap whiskey, greed and hatred, Willie Stoke (Billy Bob Thornton) returns as "Santa," this time in an effort to knock off a Chicago charity on Christmas Eve. It's a hysterical sequel just outrageous enough to outdo the original.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: The skull-busting war clubs of legendary Chief Crazy Horse take on the blazing rifles of Mexico's revolutionary hero Pancho Villa in this warrior match-up.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: This season of Alone features a brand new challenge as seven pairs of family members are dropped miles apart on Northern Vancouver Island, where they must find each other and survive together.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Ten survivalists from previous seasons return for redemption and a second chance to win the $500,000 prize. This time, they face the dangers of Northern Mongolia, a location more remote than they've ever seen.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The wheels start turning when four bladesmiths must forge friction folders from a rusty pickup truck. The salvaged steel proves temperamental, causing a few of the blades and smiths to crack under the pressure.

programme.desc: Don and the team investigate murders that are being copied from a yet-to-be-released movie, and Larry leaves for his adventure.

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of Anwar Samir, a Saudi Arabian medical intern, who became upset when his boss refused his request and his girlfriend declined his proposal.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team investigate a father, Greg Prichard (BRETT CULLEN), and his daughter, Kyla (BRYNN LAUREN LEMON), who disappear during their regular morning routine.

programme.title: The Agency
programme.desc: Covert CIA agent Martian is called back to London Station. An incident in Belarus puts Bosko and Henry on a collision course with Langley. Danny learns a lesson. Someone unexpectedly reappears in Martian's life. Series premiere.

programme.title: The Agency
programme.desc: Dr. Blake arrives from Langley and is put to a test by Martian and Henry. A spooked source threatens to put an operation at risk. Danny's cover is put in play. Martian, overtaken by events, begins to question Sami's motives.

programme.title: Dexter
programme.desc: In the Season Two premiere, Dexter finds himself unable to kill again after the harrowing conclusion to the Ice Truck Killer case, and strays from his personal code with disastrous results; Debra returns to work but may not be ready.

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: Showdown on the bridge as the Killer reveals his endgame.

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: Eva's case hits a wall putting Marco and Sonya in the cross hairs.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The citizens of a small Long Island town are shocked when 13-year-old Annie Miller disappears on her way to school. Then, 24 hours later, her best friend is also reported missing.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for a pregnant woman, Kathy Dobson, who disappeared from a hospital before being told that she has serious complications.

programme.title: Without A Trace

programme.desc: The bucket wheel excavators' mission is to peel back the surface of the Earth with each turn of their colossal parts. These building-sized behemoths cut, scrape, blast, and dig through dirt and rock to get to the most precious minerals on the planet.

programme.title: Dirty Great Machines

programme.title: Dirty Great Machines

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le ruega a Juan que vuelva con Julieta, porque a su lado sólo sufrirá en medio de sus confusiones y compromisos. Él, furioso, busca a Julieta y le pide que se reconcilien y, aunque ella duda sobre la decisión, finalmente lo hacen oficial.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica no quiere que Alejandro se vaya del pueblo. Él aprovecha la oportunidad para repetirle que la ama. En una misión especial a San Pedro, el comisionado Balmaceda tiene su primer enfrentamiento con Antonia. Ricardo trata su problema de impotencia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia es sacada de su hacienda esposada; Balmaceda es obligado a llevársela cargándola. Verónica le da pistas al comisionado acerca de Guerra. Lucho teme que el mismo policía que lo llevó a prisión descubra todo. David es sorprendido con su novia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro quiere ayudar a David a pedir la mano de Cecilia. Pero antes, quiere saber si está enamorado de ella. Verónica y Lucho están a punto de hacer el amor. Antonia ve desnudo a Balmaseda en su cuarto y sueña que tiene una noche de pasión con él.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le pide a su novio que huya de casa porque Rodrigo ha iniciado un operativo para detenerlo. Irene escucha que su marido ama a Verónica, busca un calmante en el baño de Antonia y encuentra el frasquito del veneno que ella usa con Valentina.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena le cuenta a Norma sus sospechas sobre las intenciones de Óscar y Juan, luego que los escucha hablar de la fortuna Elizondo y encuentra fotos de Libia, se aterran al recordar quién era.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia, una de las vendedoras del mercado, le cuenta todo a Jimena acerca de la muerte de Libia. Franco renuncia a su empleo con Eduvina, y ella le arma un escándalo a Rosario en el bar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena cree que Juan y Óscar quieren envenenarla a ella y a su hermana, tras golpear a su esposo, Norma la rescata en la calle. Franco es traicionado por Rosario y Eduvina intenta suicidarse.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llama a una ambulancia para salvar a Óscar, Juan confirma que las Elizondo saben todo sobre Libia. Eva confiesa lo que hizo y su rencor hacia Gabriela y revela el secreto de su hija.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le ruega a Juan que vuelva con Julieta, porque a su lado sólo sufrirá en medio de sus confusiones y compromisos. Él, furioso, busca a Julieta y le pide que se reconcilien y, aunque ella duda sobre la decisión, finalmente lo hacen oficial.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan le dice a Paula que se atenga a las consecuencias y la amenaza con hacerle la vida imposible, si ella decide no vender su parte. Ambos se declaran la guerra. Emilio habla con su hija, ella siente algo especial por el supuesto amigo de Modesto.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Rosa descubre los juegos sexuales de Sofía con su esposo. Miguel se asusta y Sofía trata de controlar la situación. Juan descubre que su matrimonio es una mentira. Está muy decidido a hacerles la vida imposible a Paula y su mamá.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta pierde el control y golpea peligrosamente a Sofía, pero miente sobre lo que hizo. Es tanta la presión y la rabia, que se desmaya. Gaspar descubre las mentiras de José sobre Paula y la herencia, y está decidido a revelarlas.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica no quiere que Alejandro se vaya del pueblo. Él aprovecha la oportunidad para repetirle que la ama. En una misión especial a San Pedro, el comisionado Balmaceda tiene su primer enfrentamiento con Antonia. Ricardo trata su problema de impotencia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the first city sprint, the final four teams race through Manila, the capital of the Philippines, where they have no road blocks and no detours.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final three teams travel to New Orleans, where one team is crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While racing through Scotland in February 2020, teams receive shocking and unprecedented news - for the first time in the show's history, THE AMAZING RACE suspends production due to the COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Host Phil Keoghan gathers the teams in Switzerland to restart the Race nearly 20 months after production was suspended for the.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Switzerland, where Racers bungee jump over 700 feet off the Verzasca Dam.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel by private jet to Corsica, France, where they go canyoneering through the beautiful landscape of natural rockslides, waterfalls, and rivers.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams continue racing through Corsica, France, where each team member must try a piece of casu martzu, also known as maggot.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Halkidiki, Greece, where they are tested on their spelling and memory skills.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers leave no stone unturned while looking for a clue in Thessaloniki, Greece.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After traveling to seven countries and 17 cities, one team will be crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard proposes to Millie after three months of dating but soon realizes they may be rushing it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy learns his cousin Bradford is a broke phony, but keeps quiet because Aunt Bee thinks he's a wealthy relative.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy catches the flu and Goober takes over as his deputy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard quits his boring job as county clerk and becomes a Caribbean island beachcomber.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober buys the gas station with financial backing from Andy and Emmett.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee hosts a TV cooking show and Andy and Opie must fend for themselves.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Emmett is needled into becoming an insurance salesman by his wife and her brother, a successful broker.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie breaks a bottle of expensive perfume on his new job as a drug clerk.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A $500 bequest to the Mayberry church almost provokes a schism over how to spend it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife is on the spot when he gets Andy to let him use the Taylor home for an American-Russian summit meeting.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober tries to impress an old mechanics' school friend by treating him to a lavish dinner and claiming to own a chain of gas stations.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee does well with her flying lessons until the instructor tells her she's ready to go solo -- then she becomes terrified.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy learns that his girlfriend, Helen, was once arrested for carrying a gun, gambling and keeping company with a hoodlum.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Emmett plans to surprise his wife with a mink coat for their 25th wedding anniversary, but she thinks he's not faithful because of his furtive ways.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard's mother remarries and moves away, so Howard remodels their home into a bachelor pad and tries to throw a swinging party.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Sam Jones is urged by Andy and his other Mayberry neighbors to run for Town Council.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Sam Jones' son Mike idolizes Opie and doesn't understand why he prefers to spend time with a girl instead of him.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Sam want to find a girlfriend for Goober and convince him to try a computer dating service.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Sam Jones invites a buddy from Italy to help him work his farm but does not expect his family to come too.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's son, Opie, demands that their new housekeeper, Andy's aunt, be fired after the old one leaves to get married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives the state troopers a lesson in the efficiency of a county sheriff when a dangerous criminal escapes.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A hometown guitar player auditions with a dance band in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie Walker, a pretty young graduate pharmacist, moves to Mayberry to help her uncle out in the local drugstore.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy thinks Ellie is out to marry him. After a series of misunderstandings, Andy finally takes Ellie to the church picnic.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy gives his son, Opie, a lecture on keeping promises, but must break one of his own in order to persuade a runaway kid to come home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie stage a hold-up at the drugstore so that Barney can impress Miss Rosemary with his heroics.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy makes a judgment concerning his son, Opie, before hearing the boy's side of the story.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross will fascinate you with this crimson winter scene, where cabin and snow are virtually undisturbed and the evergreens are full.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Melting snow from the mountains creates a rushing flow of water into a valley just awakening for spring. Feel the crisp new season with Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The mountains and the sky sing in harmony as Bob Ross's brushes tell a story of breathtaking hue and depth.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel deep into the forest with Bob Ross and discover the beauty and serenity of an elegant waterfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: One of nature's perfect creations -- the misty, splashing waterfall -- is painted by Bob Ross, in all its magnificent splendor.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the midst of the forest flows a stream that splashes and trickles endlessly along - Bob Ross depicts the true beauty of nature.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross transforms a zany looking canvas into a gorgeous, soft wooded scene with radiant sun glowing over opulent trees and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' gentle brush strokes create bending palm trees on the edge of a sea coast, just before the water reaches its high point.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross presents an intriguing painting with an outline of the 'sunshine state', and then creates a lovely beach setting within the borders.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this painting, Bob Ross presents a most statuesque ridge of peaks overlooking a little country home by the cove.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A cleverly constructed shape on canvas! Peek through the panes with artist Bob Ross and share a beautiful snowy day outside.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A truly graceful scene, as if floating in air -- icy pond and weather-worn cabin -- is today's Bob Ross winter landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a relaxing walk with Bob Ross through a bright green grassy forest, where a smooth crystal waterway flows so, so quietly.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Fresh morning lake and succulent evergreens -- watch Bob Ross create a peaceful, dewy brown mountain scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A playful brook appears the perfect complement to a range of rugged mountains in this Bob Ross setting on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Imagine stumbling upon this little surprise cabin and shed, nestled in the snow drifts! Bob Ross shows you how easy it is to paint.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Slip away into a wondrous plush green forest where Bob Ross creates an almost invisible mountain overlooking a falling stream.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
